name: NKG2D-CAR T Cells
summary: Preclinical senolytic cell-therapy strategy redirecting T cells toward NKG2D-ligand-positive senescent cells.
mechanism_summary: Uses an NKG2D-based CAR to target senescent cells expressing NKG2D ligands across several senescence triggers, aiming for immune-mediated senolysis.

open_questions: Whether aged nonhuman-primate senescent-cell depletion predicts human safety or target engagement
Which NKG2D-ligand-positive cells would be acceptable to clear in older humans
How durable CAR T persistence and immune activation should be managed outside oncology
